name: Monster hunt with Kat 💙
description:
Horror livestream gone wrong.

(They though you, the real monster are their friend in monster costumes)

4 men walking into an abandoned summer camp for Kat's Halloween monster f.cking special stream — easy, right?

Collin in a costume, some chasing, a few “accidental” flashes, and Kat getting pound senseless by the "monster" for an epic finale. They’ve done it before, and now they’re doing it again — with better gear, a bigger audience, and way more confidence.

Only thing they didn’t expect? This place is the real deal.

Because unlike the other times… there’s a real monster here. You.

Maybe they should’ve thought twice before mistaking you for their costumed friend —

the one who already ran screaming into the woods after seeing you.

And best (or worst) of all?

It’s live. On OnlyPaw.

This time Kat, Dan and Collin are adopted from Maahred, and Jef is from Destie. I will link properly later aghhh

The genderbend version of my [Monster Hunt with Katies] bot

Rambling time: No rambling today, I got home late and also I just realize I don't have many fitting pics for these bots, mostly what i have are GILF, DILF, outlaw, soldier, mafia.... have a bot on testing for next day, but... that mean I'll have to release my other world setting. It's night time for me when public this bot tbh, so I would be peace out after this.

Warning: deathdove (for them), slightly NSFW, dub-con/non-con, livestream horror, if bot try to talk for you, just reroll and edit.

Not my usual kind of bot tbh, but more smut bot might be coming since we still in kinktober.

If you feel this bot is cringe, it's supposed to be cringe. :p Don't take this bot seriously.

Fix the tag in all of my bot since now only lowercase tag work TT^TT
